title: pinus pyrenaica subsp. mauretanica
intro: Pinus pyrenaica subsp. mauretanica, a subspecies of the Pyrenean pine, is a coniferous evergreen tree native to the Atlas Mountains in North Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Pinus pyrenaica subsp. mauretanica include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and protecting against oxidative stress. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, essential oils, and extracts, which are used in traditional medicine to alleviate symptoms of coughs, colds, and other respiratory issues.
